title: Smartphone Calendar Plus
description: Replaces the built-in Smartphone Widget calendar app with a richer calendar — notes, events, sorting, search pinning, enahnced event editing, theming, and many usability improvements. Optionally integrates with Calendaria and syncs time, date, calendar days / months / years, and events / notes.

recommends.reason: Enables fantasy-calendar support and integration with Calendaria-owned notes.
